organization.name: Rate
organization.raw_address: 3940 N. Ravenswood, Chicago, IL 60613, US
organization.short_description:
Rate, based in Chicago, is a residential mortgage company founded in 2000 by Victor Ciardelli. The company specializes in home purchase, refinance, and home equity loans, emphasizing low rates and fast approvals. With over 340 branches across 47-50 states and more than 4,000 agents, Rate operates nationwide and offers services through online applications, mobile apps, and in-person support.

Rate utilizes advanced technology to streamline the mortgage process, providing quick preapprovals and one-day mortgage approvals. The company offers a variety of mortgage options, including fixed-rate, adjustable-rate, FHA, VA, and specialized loans for unique borrower needs. Key programs include PowerBid Approval for competitive bidding and OneDown for low-to-moderate income borrowers, which provides down payment assistance. Rate is committed to serving diverse customer profiles, including Spanish speakers and self-employed individuals, while maintaining a focus on transparency and customer service.

organization.name: MJW Mortgage
organization.raw_address: 8465 Keystone Crossing, Indianapolis, Indiana 46240, US
organization.short_description:
Our Story:

Now known as MJW Mortgage, MJW Financial LLC first opened its doors in early 2008 in spite of the unfavorable housing market conditions. Unhappy with the reputation given to mortgage banks subsequent to the fall of numerous lenders, the founder decided to create a company whose sole purpose would be to provide affordable and appropriate mortgages to both homeowners with the desire to refinance, and home buyers wishing to purchase. Customer service and the willingness to exhaust every available resource are the two main principles that drive the MJW team.

MJW's ultimate goal is to understand your immediate needs, as well as your plans for the future, and introduce you to a loan that will satisfy both. Fulfilling this goal with every customer has resulted in MJW growing every year since it's inception.

Our Values

The founders of MJW Mortgage pride themselves on the delivery of an unmatched mortgage experience.

Doing the Right Thing: When shopping for a home there can be multiple options for any client. We believe outstanding mortgage service starts with advising clients on the best possible options and scenarios for their personal budget and needs. We tailor the mortgage to best fit the client's situation, and not to maximize profits.

Delivering on the Promise: At MJW Mortgage we make a promise to each customer to provide excellent service by communicating often and openly, and executing tasks quickly, in order to complete the loan process with ease. We proudly deliver on-time closings for our clients and realtor referral partners.

Focus on People: Our mission since opening has been to help clients understand the mortgage process. Buying a home is a big investment, and we want every client to feel informed and secure in their decision. Our team aims to create trust with every client, by ensuring availability and communication throughout the home buying process.

https://mjwmortgage.com/equal-housing-opportunity/

Cherry Creek Mortgage focuses on creating tailored solutions to assist clients in navigating high costs and interest rates. Their programs are designed to make homeownership more accessible for a variety of buyers.

organization.name: Stockton Mortgage
organization.raw_address: 88 C. Michael Davenport Blvd., Frankfort, KY 40601, US
organization.short_description:
Stockton Mortgage Corporation is a full-service, independent mortgage bank based in Frankfort, Kentucky. Founded in 2001 by David Stockton, the company has expanded significantly, now employing over 300 professionals across 37 branches in 10 states, with licensing in 21 states. 

The company offers a variety of loan programs, including conventional home loans, FHA home loans, and home improvement loans. Stockton Mortgage takes pride in its in-house approach, where mortgage bankers collaborate directly with underwriters and processors. This structure enables them to provide tailored mortgage solutions and quick approval timelines. The company emphasizes a personalized, community-focused service, ensuring that they know their clients by name rather than by loan number. They focus on assisting first-time homebuyers, refinancing, and debt consolidation.

organization.name: GO Mortgage
organization.raw_address: 4215 Worth Ave, 320, Columbus, Ohio 43219, US
organization.short_description:
GO Mortgage LLC is a nationwide independent mortgage bank that focuses on simplifying the home financing process. Founded in 2015 and based in Columbus, Ohio, the company operates as a subsidiary of GSF Mortgage Corporation and is licensed in 42 states and the District of Columbia. With a commitment to customer service and education, GO Mortgage offers a variety of home loan products, including conventional, FHA, VA, and jumbo loans for purchases and refinances, as well as construction and renovation financing.

The company emphasizes technology to enhance efficiency and provides end-to-end support for clients. Their services include rate locking before construction, streamlined draws and inspections, and local expertise in various financing scenarios. GO Mortgage has received positive customer feedback for its professionalism and responsiveness, particularly from first-time buyers and those navigating complex financing situations. With an A+ BBB rating and high customer ratings across platforms, GO Mortgage is dedicated to helping clients achieve their homeownership goals.

organization.name: Verity Mortgage
organization.raw_address: 16970 Dallas Parkway Suite 401, Suite 350, Dallas, tx 75248, US
organization.short_description:
If time is the measure of a company, then Verity Mortgage, a member of the Eustis Mortgage Corporation family of companies is setting a high bar for our competition.

Over 60 years ago, Eustis Mortgage Corporation opened its doors with a focus on two things that all great organizations have in common. 

Low staff turnover and a high percentage of repeat customers.  

At our company, we have both. We have repeat customers because we have great people. We are fortunate to have great people because we realize that great people are our value proposition. 

We will continue, as we always have , to navigate through the ever changing mortgage world.  Whether it is a new technology or new regulations, Verity always stands at the forefront of these changes to make sure we stay focused on our customers.

Verity, deriving from the Latin word VERITAS, means a true principle of fundamental importance.  

Our principals will be the beacon to which we set our direction.  We will differentiate ourselves through our values and ability to exceed our customer's expectations.

Nothing is more important than our customers which one of the principles our founder, Laurance Eustis, instilled in the company over 60 years ago.

We look forward to serving you for the next 60 years.

Verity Mortgage is an equal housing lender. NMLS #70345

organization.short_description:
Union Home Mortgage Corp. is a full-service mortgage banker based in Strongsville, Ohio, founded in 1970. The company is dedicated to making homeownership accessible for everyone and has successfully guided hundreds of thousands of homebuyers through the process. Led by President and CEO Bill Cosgrove, Union Home Mortgage operates in 48 states and Washington D.C., with an annual lending volume exceeding $5 billion.

The company offers a variety of mortgage products and services, including a 1% Down Payment Program for first-time homebuyers, USDA mortgage lending, home equity lines of credit, and refinancing options. Union Home Mortgage is recognized as one of the top USDA mortgage lenders in the nation. The company fosters a unique culture by referring to its workforce as "Partners" and has received numerous accolades, including multiple appearances on the Inc. 500 list and recognition as a Top Workplace in Northeast Ohio and by USA Today.

organization.name: Fairway Independent Mortgage Corporation
organization.raw_address: 4750 S. Biltmore Lane, Madison, WI 53718, US
organization.short_description:
Fairway Independent Mortgage Corporation is a nationwide mortgage lender founded in 1996 and headquartered in Madison, Wisconsin, and Carrollton, Texas. The company operates in all 50 states, focusing on purchase mortgages to help Americans achieve homeownership. Fairway has experienced significant growth, funding over $65.8 billion in loans by 2020 and employing between 3,600 and over 10,000 team members across more than 345 branches.

Fairway offers a variety of mortgage loan products with competitive rates and personalized guidance throughout the process. Key services include quick pre-approvals through the FairwayNOW app, efficient processing, and a commitment to consistent communication. The company emphasizes a team-oriented culture and core values such as humility, trust, and service. Fairway also engages in philanthropic efforts through Fairway Cares, supporting various causes, including service dogs for veterans and disaster relief initiatives.

organization.raw_address: 700 East Gate Drive, Suite 400, Mount Laurel, NJ 08054, US
organization.short_description:
AnnieMac Home Mortgage is a nationwide mortgage lender based in Mount Laurel, New Jersey, founded in 2010. The company specializes in home purchase financing and mortgage refinances, operating approximately 100 branches across the U.S. It is licensed in 47 states and Washington D.C., employing around 1,000 team members. Since its inception, AnnieMac has funded over $32 billion in loans, with a focus on providing a range of mortgage products, including conventional loans, government-backed options, jumbo loans, and renovation mortgages.

AnnieMac emphasizes customer service and transparency, treating clients as partners. The company offers innovative tools like the Cash2Keys program to help buyers make competitive offers. It also supports real estate professionals with marketing resources and education. Community involvement is important to AnnieMac, with initiatives such as the annual “Fetch The Ball” Golf Tournament and partnerships with organizations like Habitat for Humanity. The company aims to grow and become a top 20 mortgage originator and servicer by 2025.

organization.short_description:
Highlands Residential Mortgage, Ltd. is an independent mortgage banker established in 2010 and based in Allen, Texas. The company operates over 40 branch locations across multiple states, providing a range of residential mortgage services. These services include home purchase loans, refinance options, cash-out financing, and various loan products tailored to meet individual needs. Dedicated loan officers offer local market expertise and exceptional customer service, utilizing mobile app technology for real-time updates and efficient closings.

The leadership team includes Chairman William R. Starkey Sr., CEO Ken Hickman, and President Brian Bennett, among others. Highlands fosters an employee-centric culture focused on growth and community reinvestment. The company has received numerous accolades, including recognition as the #1 Best Mortgage Company to Work For in America by National Mortgage News in 2019. With approximately 356 employees and a commitment to superior service, Highlands aims to build strong relationships with clients and partners in the real estate industry.

organization.short_description:
Merchants Bank of Indiana is a key banking subsidiary of Merchants Bancorp, a diversified bank holding company based in Carmel, Indiana. With $18.8 billion in assets and $12.4 billion in deposits as of March 31, 2025, the bank is recognized for its strong performance in the U.S. banking sector.

The bank specializes in various financial services, including multi-family mortgage banking, mortgage warehousing, and community banking. It provides financing and servicing for multi-family housing and healthcare facilities, as well as commercial loans and deposit services. Merchants Bank of Indiana also offers a range of consumer and deposit products, such as competitive money market accounts, Flex Index CDs, Fixed Rate CDs, and All in One Loans, aimed at helping customers save on mortgage interest. The bank emphasizes local expertise in personal and business banking, catering to a diverse clientele across Indiana and surrounding markets.

organization.short_description:
Wintrust Mortgage is a division of Barrington Bank & Trust Company, N.A., part of Wintrust Financial Corporation, a major financial holding company based in Rosemont, Illinois. Established in 1981, Wintrust Mortgage is a full-service residential mortgage lender with a mission to promote homeownership across all 50 states. The company combines local expertise from its loan originators with the stability of a large financial institution, operating over 65 lending offices and more than 190 locations nationwide.

With over 45 years of mortgage lending experience, Wintrust Mortgage offers a variety of mortgage products, including conventional loans, FHA and VA programs, and jumbo loans. The company focuses on providing competitive pricing, advanced technology, and exceptional customer service to streamline the mortgage process. Wintrust Mortgage emphasizes building personal relationships and strengthening communities through homeownership, making it one of the largest mortgage bankers in the U.S.

DHI Mortgage is a full-service mortgage lender based in Austin, Texas, and operates as a subsidiary of D.R. Horton, Inc., the largest homebuilder in the U.S. Founded in 1997, DHI Mortgage focuses on providing financing solutions primarily for D.R. Horton homebuyers. The company aims to create a seamless homebuying experience by offering a range of mortgage products, including conforming loans, FHA, VA, and USDA loans.

DHI Mortgage supports D.R. Horton's mission of affordable homeownership, treating every buyer with care and respect. The company operates in 33-34 states, with significant activity in Texas, Florida, California, and several others. It provides various application methods, including online, in-person, and phone options, ensuring accessibility for aspiring homeowners. DHI Mortgage emphasizes family-first support for both customers and employees, reflecting its commitment to quality service.

organization.name: CrossCountry Mortgage, LLC
organization.raw_address: 2160 Superior Ave E, Cleveland, Ohio 44114, US
organization.short_description:
CrossCountry Mortgage, LLC (CCM) is a leading retail mortgage lender based in Cleveland, Ohio. Founded in 2003, the company has expanded significantly, operating over 700 branches across all 50 states, Washington D.C., and Puerto Rico, with a workforce of more than 7,000 employees. CCM is recognized as America's #1 retail mortgage lender and is approved as a seller and servicer by Freddie Mac, Fannie Mae, and Ginnie Mae.

CCM offers a wide range of mortgage solutions, including home purchase mortgages, refinancing options, and home equity products. Their innovative offerings include CCM CashPlus, CCM EasyGreen, and CCM Lock2Sell, designed to enhance borrower choices. In 2024, the company achieved significant milestones, financing over 83,000 home purchases and funding nearly $10 billion in purchase volume in just one quarter. CCM is also committed to community support, providing over $15 million in down payment assistance to first-time homebuyers and engaging in numerous charitable initiatives.

organization.name: Guild Mortgage
organization.raw_address: 5887 Copley Dr, San Diego, California 92111, US
organization.short_description:
Guild Mortgage is a prominent independent mortgage lender based in San Diego, California, founded in 1960. The company specializes in residential home loans, refinancing, and mortgage solutions, with a strong emphasis on serving first-time homebuyers, veterans, and underserved communities. Guild has a rich history, having pioneered FHA loans and expanded into wholesale lending, which significantly contributed to its growth.

With over 4,300 employees, Guild operates in 49 states and the District of Columbia. The company offers a variety of mortgage products, including government-backed loans such as FHA, VA, and USDA loans, as well as conventional loans and refinancing options. Guild is committed to providing personalized experiences through local in-house origination and servicing, focusing on high-quality purchase loans and innovative programs tailored for Hispanic and veteran communities. The company is recognized for its collaborative culture and long-term employee retention, and it has received accolades such as the Military Friendly Employer Gold award.

organization.short_description:
Indiana Members Credit Union (IMCU) is a member-owned, not-for-profit credit union established in 1956 by employees of the Indiana University Medical Center. Headquartered in Indianapolis, it is the largest credit union in Central Indiana, serving over 160,000 members with assets exceeding $2.9 billion. IMCU operates 31-33 full-service branches across Central, Southern, and Southwestern Indiana.

IMCU offers a comprehensive range of financial products and services for both consumers and businesses. This includes personal and business loans, mortgages, checking and savings accounts, credit and debit cards, and digital banking solutions. The credit union emphasizes simplicity, security, and convenience, providing competitive rates and friendly service. IMCU is committed to community involvement, supporting education and philanthropy through initiatives like the Indiana Members Foundation and various partnerships with local organizations.

Guild Mortgage is a prominent independent mortgage lender based in San Diego, California, founded in 1960. The company specializes in residential home loans, refinancing, and mortgage solutions, with a strong emphasis on serving first-time homebuyers, veterans, and underserved communities. Guild has a rich history, having pioneered FHA loans and expanded into wholesale lending, which significantly contributed to its growth.

With over 4,300 employees, Guild operates in 49 states and the District of Columbia. The company offers a variety of mortgage products, including government-backed loans such as FHA, VA, and USDA loans, as well as conventional loans and refinancing options. Guild is committed to providing personalized experiences through local in-house origination and servicing, focusing on high-quality purchase loans and innovative programs tailored for Hispanic and veteran communities. The company is recognized for its collaborative culture and long-term employee retention, and it has received accolades such as the Military Friendly Employer Gold award.

organization.name: Southwest Funding
organization.raw_address: 13150 Coit Road #100, Dallas, Texas 75240, US
organization.short_description:
Southwest Funding, LP is a wholesale mortgage lender based in Dallas, Texas, established in 1993. The company specializes in home financing solutions across the United States and operates as a privately-held qualified housing lender. With a strong focus on service, Southwest Funding has maintained an A+ rating and has been accredited by the Better Business Bureau since 2003. The company employs around 600 people and reports annual revenue of approximately $904.7 million.

Southwest Funding offers a diverse range of home loan products, including Conventional, FHA, and VA loans, as well as brokerage, escrow services, and reverse mortgages. The company is dedicated to providing competitive rates and multiple mortgage programs to enhance approval rates for borrowers. Its tailored financing solutions aim to help clients secure home loans efficiently.
